note: Module 5 — IF a back-end/adjacency move were considered, the inputs that actually bind a foundry/back-end decision, aligned to the revised (July 2026) appendix and quality-tagged. Electricity price and EMC graduate share are retained here per request, but framed as secondary inputs: power AVAILABILITY and the ABSOLUTE experienced-engineer pool matter more than price or graduate percentages.

field_order.label: EMC graduate share (context, not talent supply)

power_availability.value: Peninsular grid is the region's most capable for large industrial loads; site-level firm-MW for a fab must be confirmed with TNB.

reliability.value: 0.5 hr (WB Doing Business 2020 reference utility); 22.3% of firms reported outages (2024). The earlier 'sub-2-minute SAIDI' claim was an error and is removed; official historical SAIDI is on the order of tens of minutes/customer/yr.

electricity_price.value: ~0.140 USD/kWh (general commercial tariff, 2025/09; NOT a large-user fab rate — big users also pay max-demand, capacity, network, AFA).

experienced_engineer_pool.value: ~5,000 semiconductor-track engineering graduates/yr (reported, not semiconductor-exclusive). Prior '~600,000 E&E engineers' claim removed as an employment/engineer conflation.

emc_grad_share.value: 21.59% (2024; down from 29.01% in 2023 — check for reclassification).

supply_chain_adjacency.value: Back-end consumables/equipment co-located in Penang; front-end specialty materials imported.

incentives_zones.value: Penang, Kulim (KHTP), Selangor, Johor; National Semiconductor Strategy incentives.

binding_constraint.value: High-end talent gap and poaching pressure toward Singapore.

power_availability.value: Northern industrial zones adequate for back-end; dry-season hydro shortfall and peak curtailment are risks for 24/7 loads.

reliability.value: 2.1 hr (WB DB 2020 reference utility); 43% of firms reported outages (2024). Reference values and survey shares are not directly comparable.

electricity_price.value: ~0.077–0.120 USD/kWh (mixes national average and southern industrial/time-of-use; proxy only, not cross-comparable).

experienced_engineer_pool.value: ~15,000 semiconductor specialists, ~7,000 in IC design (reported stock). 137,000 is enrollment in related programs, not deployable engineers.

emc_grad_share.value: UIS value missing across recent years — data gap.

supply_chain_adjacency.value: Some back-end materials/equipment via FDI; front-end nearly absent.

incentives_zones.value: Bac Ninh, Hoa Lac, HCMC, Dong Nai industrial parks; NIC programs.

binding_constraint.value: Front-end supply chain and power-quality variability.

power_availability.value: EEC offers fast renewable grid connection; firm-MW for a fab must be confirmed with MEA/PEA per voltage/demand.

reliability.value: 0.5 hr (WB DB 2020 reference utility); firm-outage % data gap. Reference value only — cannot generalize to all industrial zones.

electricity_price.value: ~0.10–0.12 USD/kWh (industrial estimate, 2025; confirm project rate with MEA/PEA/ERC).

experienced_engineer_pool.value: Semiconductor sandbox first cohort ~161 (program-level); government 5-year plan targets ~80,000 semiconductor workforce (target, not stock). KMITL 86,000 is a multi-year institutional plan, not annual supply.

supply_chain_adjacency.value: Deep PCB/power material base; front-end wafer materials not established.

incentives_zones.value: EEC, Chonburi, Samut Prakan, Lamphun/Lampang; BOI incentives.

binding_constraint.value: Front-end talent and supply chain still being built; EV transition reshaping automotive demand.

power_availability.value: Java/Bali grid adequate for light industry; outer-island supply weak and uneven — a real constraint for 24/7 loads.

reliability.value: 2.8 hr (WB DB 2020 reference utility); 12.7% of firms reported outages (2023). Prior '14–65% need own generators' was a sample-specific study, not generalized.

electricity_price.value: ~0.08–0.10 USD/kWh (PLN I-3/I-4 estimate; subsidies and regional variation large; confirm with PLN).

experienced_engineer_pool.value: No unified current semiconductor talent stock; ARM×Danantara targets up to 15,000 trainees (target). Prior 'tens of thousands/yr' not used for precise comparison.

emc_grad_share.value: 15.82% (latest 2023; 2024 value blank in UIS — cannot be stated as 2024).

supply_chain_adjacency.value: Electronic-grade processing not yet formed; silica-downstreaming is a policy roadmap.

incentives_zones.value: Batam FTZ, Java industrial zones; EV/local-content policy.

binding_constraint.value: Ecosystem and supply-chain depth (weakest of the five — author comparison).

power_availability.value: Metro Manila (Meralco) adequate; provincial supply weaker; manufacturers commonly keep own generation — a cost/feasibility factor.

reliability.value: 3.6 hr (WB DB 2020 reference utility); 43.9% of firms reported outages (2023). Meralco vs provincial co-ops differ sharply.

electricity_price.value: ~0.15–0.20 USD/kWh (among region's highest; location/voltage variation large).

experienced_engineer_pool.value: ~47,466 engineering/technology graduates (2021/22, clearer national proxy); IC designers only ~1,000. Upskill target ~128,000 is a different caliber and not annual graduates.

supply_chain_adjacency.value: ATP consumables present; high-end materials/equipment imported.

incentives_zones.value: CALABARZON, Metro Manila, Luzon, Cebu; PEZA zones.

binding_constraint.value: High electricity cost, reliability variance, and limited IC-design depth.
